item.title: A Forged Knot Settles Into Place
item.description: Watch the steel settle into place at the very end in this blacksmithing and metalworking moment.

item.title: Reading Steel by Heat Color
item.description: The steel gives away the story the moment the heat comes up. A close look at heat color in blacksmithing and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Reading Steel by Heat Color
media:content.media:description: The steel gives away the story the moment the heat comes up. A close look at heat color in blacksmithing and metalworking.

item.title: Forging Rivet Headers in the Forge
item.description: A calm blacksmithing look at forging rivet headers and shaping useful shop tools with heat, precision, and traditional metalworking skill.

media:content.media:title: Forging Rivet Headers in the Forge
media:content.media:description: A calm blacksmithing look at forging rivet headers and shaping useful shop tools with heat, precision, and traditional metalworking skill.

item.title: Steel Settles Into a Cleaner Finish
item.description: Watch the steel settle into a cleaner, sharper finish in this blacksmithing and metalworking reveal.

media:content.media:title: Steel Settles Into a Cleaner Finish
media:content.media:description: Watch the steel settle into a cleaner, sharper finish in this blacksmithing and metalworking reveal.

item.title: A Small Forge Job, Big Shop Fix

media:content.media:description: A small forge job that solves a bigger shop problem than you’d expect.

item.title: Fly Press Trick for Smooth Hinges
item.description: A small setup change makes an old job feel surprisingly effortless in this blacksmithing shop project.

media:content.media:description: A small setup change makes an old job feel surprisingly effortless in this blacksmithing shop project.

item.title: Small Forge Work, Clean Lines, Satisfying Finish

item.title: Spring Steel Transformed Into a Useful Tool
item.description: A satisfying reveal as tough scrap is shaped into a practical tool through blacksmithing and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Spring Steel Transformed Into a Useful Tool
media:content.media:description: A satisfying reveal as tough scrap is shaped into a practical tool through blacksmithing and metalworking.
